title: Chart - Open vs. Done Tasks
excerpt:
I’d like to make a dashboard chart or other widget that shows employees’ OPEN vs. DONE tasks. If it’s filterable by date range that would be even better. Does anyone have a solution for this? 
Thanks

posts.author: JacksonBarry (Jackson Barry)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to make a dashboard chart or other widget that shows employees’ OPEN vs. DONE tasks. If it’s filterable by date range that would be even better. Does anyone have a solution for this?

Thanks

posts.cookedHtml:

You can use the chart widget , The widget allows you to filter the data by person and date.
